allow: Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute serverless_ai_gateway --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _migrations")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute serverless_ai_gateway --local --command "SELECT * FROM _migrations")
Bash(rm -f test.db && npm test -- tests/api/ai/messages.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -E "\\[GLOBAL|ERROR|should handle|Created vendor|Created model|Retrieved vendor")
Bash(npm test -- --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "should create a model linked to OpenAI vendor")
Bash(lsof -i :9999 2>/dev/null || echo "No process found on port 9999")
Bash(lsof -i :3000 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo "No process on port 3000")
Bash(pkill -f "vitest" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "tsx src/local.ts" 2>/dev/null; echo "Cleaned up processes")
Bash(sleep 2 && lsof -i :3000 -i :9999 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo "No processes on ports 3000 or 9999")

Bash(cat > /Volumes/PDATA/GitDB/serverless_ai_gateway/.github/workflows/test.yml << 'EOF'
name: Tests

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]

jobs:
  # Node mode tests
  test-node:
    name: Test \(Node Mode\)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles\('**/package-lock.json'\) }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests \(Node mode\)
        run: npm run test:node

  # Worker mode tests
  test-worker:
    name: Test \(Worker Mode\)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles\('**/package-lock.json'\) }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests \(Worker mode\)
        run: npm run test:worker
EOF)
